_note: Illustrative curated snapshot for a prototype.
chunks: Payments and billing: We accept major credit cards and offer monthly payment plans. You can update your payment method or check your balance from your account dashboard.
Discounts and promotions: Current promotions are shown at checkout. Promo codes are applied to the aligner plan price and cannot be combined unless stated.
Retainers: After you finish treatment, retainers keep your teeth in their new position. We recommend a fresh set periodically to maintain your results.

Is it safe? Treatment is overseen remotely by licensed dental professionals. Clear aligners are a medical device; if you notice pain beyond mild soreness, loose teeth, bleeding, swelling, or any reaction, stop wearing the aligners and contact support so a clinician can review.
Contacting support: You can reach support by email or chat. For anything involving pain, injury, or a health concern, your message is routed to our clinical team rather than answered automatically.
